name: io.github.ciinkwia/lithium-vault-mcp
description: Primary-source lithium & battery-metals mining data (AISC, reserves, filings) via x402.

environmentVariables.name: CDP_API_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Coinbase CDP API key ID for the wallet that pays the per-call USDC fee

environmentVariables.name: CDP_ACCOUNT_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Named CDP account to pay from (default: lithium-vault-mcp)

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the vault endpoint base URL (default: https://clink-lithium-vault.fly.dev)

environmentVariables.name: X402_MAX_PRICE
environmentVariables.description: Max USD price per call the server will pay before refusing (default: 0.25)
